project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Dead Code Cleanup + Kotlin Quality
current_phase.details: Phases 1-5 implemented via /implement skill. 33 files modified, 1 deleted. Build + tests pass. Phase 6 (DRY refactoring) deferred. Not yet committed.

active_blockers: Wasted space in Symbols/other keyboard modes — layout doesn't fill available area
Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need to be downloaded
Compose UI test deps incompatible with API 36 (Espresso InputManager.getInstance reflection)
Test skill design fundamentally flawed — needs redesign before further E2E testing

metadata.session_notes: Session 35: Implemented dead code cleanup Phases 1-5 via /implement skill. 33 files modified, 1 deleted (LatinIMEUtil.kt). All quality gates pass. Not yet committed.
